_meta.description: Offline behavioral and religious pattern database for wordlist generation.
_meta.author: André Henrique (@mrhenrike)
_meta.note: All data sourced from public research, open religious texts, password leak analysis, and open-source wordlist generators (pipal, cupp, elpscrk, BEWGor, Crunch, intelligence-wordlist-generator, pnwgen, GoblinWordGenerator, 0day-Xfinity, SecLists).

mormonism.display: Mormonism / Church of Jesus Christ of LDS

retail_chain.description: Store/branch-based credential patterns common in retail chains (pharmacy, supermarket, fashion, etc.)

healthcare.description: Health plan, hospital and clinic credential patterns

industrial_ot.description: ICS/SCADA/OT credential patterns common in energy, manufacturing, utilities

birthday_based.note: Highly common: birth date as part of password

t9_phone.note: T9 predictive text mapping (defined in BEWGor, not yet fully activated)

leet_speak.note: Standard map from CUPP, elpscrk, intelligence-wordlist-generator. Extended map for advanced permutation.

xfinity_comcast.note: Default ISP password: word5 + 4digit + word6. Inspired by 0day-Xfinity research.

connector_patterns.note: From intelligence-wordlist-generator: connectors between token permutations

abbreviation_patterns.note: From intelligence-wordlist-generator: systematic abbreviation of keywords

permutation_strategies.note: Consolidated from cupp, elpscrk, BEWGor, intelligence-wordlist-generator, Crunch
permutation_strategies.cupp_style: All ordered pairs of (name/nick/surname variants × date fragments × years × specials)
permutation_strategies.elpscrk_style: Permutations by level (0-5): names, dates, phones, old passwords × recipes (nums, years, chars)
permutation_strategies.bewgor_style: Bounded permutations of info-set tokens (words + numbers) up to perm_length=5, min/max line length filter
permutation_strategies.crunch_style: Positional placeholders: lower(@)/upper(,)/digit(%)/symbol(^) per position, or full cartesian product
permutation_strategies.iwlgen_style: Token subsets × permutations × connectors × leet × numeric/text tails

locale_word_banks.note: Language-specific word banks extracted from pipal checkers and SecLists. Used for ML pattern matching and generation.

zodiac.note: Chinese zodiac and synonyms inspired by BEWGor

demonym_patterns.note: From BEWGor: nationality/ethnicity/demonym as password element. Lowercase + Title Case.

charsets.note: Consolidated charset definitions from Crunch, python-wordlist-generator, GoblinWordGenerator, and others.

profiling_fields.note: Consolidated from cupp, elpscrk, BEWGor — fields used for targeted password generation

phone_number_patterns.note: From pnwgen and general research — phone-as-password patterns by country

default_credential_patterns.note: Inspired by SecLists Default-Credentials — generic default patterns by device/service type
